policy: Source mechanics only; all shipped visuals, state models, interactions, and grading code are original local implementations.
human_trigger: VNC review exposed answer leakage, trivial static tasks, fake collision behavior, and a mismatch between scripted solvability and benchmark quality.

consequences_boss.transformation: Five user-created socket and seal covenants must be reconstructed after an occluding transition in shuffled order; no choice recap is rendered.

popup_exorcist.transformation: An initially anonymous parasite must be provoked, recognized from its dynamic multiplication, and physically contained before the desktop can purge.

slime_commute.transformation: Fixed-step continuous hazards, continuously checked collision, and moving-log support/carry replace destination-cell-only collision.

semantic_drag_drop_absurdity.transformation: Unlabeled specimens reveal short-lived two-axis physical responses only through operated probes, then must be routed to matching receivers.

reload_interruption.transformation: A once-previewed seven-gesture mechanism is interrupted twice by continuous moving-target holds and must be resumed from memory.

rotate_wrong_thing_upright.transformation: Continuous coupled tri-axis gimbal manipulation must be inspected across front, side, and top projections without numeric controls.

bureaucratic_signature_trap.transformation: Three independently dragged translucent form layers must expose a shared carbon aperture before a continuous closed signature can be drawn.

wonky_text_hostile_rendering.transformation: Text becomes registration material split across nonlinear optical plates; the task is physical alignment and pressing, not OCR entry.

temporal_memory_first_change.transformation: A cursor lens must follow a pre-signaled transient change through moving occluded objects, then recover the remembered identity after reshuffling.
